settings.text: Singles, sealed product, and grading — sourced and condition-checked by people who actually play. No mystery packs, no guesswork on stock.

settings.heading: New in the binder
settings.subheading: Filter by energy type — same way you'd flip through a physical box.

settings.heading: Every single, checked twice
settings.text: Condition graded under lamp against our own reference sheet before it hits the shelf or the site.

settings.heading: We buy collections
settings.text: Bring in a binder or a bulk box — cash or store credit, quoted while you wait.

settings.heading: Grading drop-off in store
settings.text: Submit through us for better turnaround than mailing in solo, tracked from drop-off to return.
